label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Partnership in Jurisdiction of Organization)
rationale: Foreign LP's legal name in its home jurisdiction. Same key family as LP_MLPA-12-1, LP_MLPA-12A (foreign-LP), LLC_MLLC-12, FICT-4.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The proposed limited partnership name* to be used in this State
rationale: Alternate Maine-use name that contains the required statutory suffix (per 31 MRSA §1308.1.A.2 must contain 'Limited Partnership', 'L.P.', or 'LP'). Same key as LP_MLPA-12-1, LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority
rationale: Fictitious Maine name under 31 MRSA §1415.1 when the home name is unavailable in Maine. Same key as LP_MLPA-12-1.
Boolean indicating Form FICT-4 (fictitious-name registration) is bundled. Same key as LP_MLPA-12-1, LP_MLPA-9.
Date the LP was originally organized in its home jurisdiction. Same key as LP_MLPA-12-1, CORP_MBCA-12.
State or country where the LP was organized.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The street and mailing address of the foreign limited partnership's principal office is: (physical location...)
rationale: Physical address of the principal office (single-line: street, city, state, zip).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address of the principal office.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The street and mailing address of the foreign limited partnership's required office is: (physical location...)
rationale: Physical address of the required office in the home jurisdiction (only when home law requires the LP to maintain a required office).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address of the required office. (Field name 'POADD2CITY' is misleading — its rect and position match the FIFTH-block 'mailing address if different' line, not a separate city component.)
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'commercial'.
Maine SOS CRA Public Number; required when registered_agent.type='commercial'.
Name of the commercial registered agent (one of two name slots). Synth fills exactly one of Text11/Text12 based on registered_agent.type.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.
Name of the noncommercial registered agent (alternative slot to Text11).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of the registered agent in Maine (NOT a P.O. Box).
Optional mailing address of the registered agent.
First general partner's name. Per-officer roster for LP general partners.
First general partner's address (single-line).
Second general partner's name.
Second general partner's address.
Third general partner's name.
Third general partner's address.

label_verbatim: Names and addresses of additional general partners are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Boolean opt-in for an exhibit listing additional general partners (4+).
Letter of the exhibit containing additional general partners.

label_verbatim: NINTH: The foreign limited partnership is a limited liability limited partnership.
rationale: Boolean elect-in for LLLP status. Same key as LP_MLPA-12-1, LP_MLPA-9.

label_verbatim: TENTH: This is a professional limited liability limited partnership...
rationale: Boolean elect-in for PLLLP status. Same key as LP_MLPA-12-1, LP_MLPA-9.
First line of the professional-services description (PLLLP only). Multi-line shape primitive matching LP_MLPA-12-1's entity.professional_services_description.line{1,2}.
Second line of the professional-services description.
Date the application is signed.

Printed name of the signing general partner — Shape B (name only, no capacity widget). Foreign-qualification (existing LP) uses filing.signer.* family rather than per-officer pattern (which is reserved for FORMATION forms like LP_MLPA-6 where there are no pre-existing officers). The (signature) line above is wet-ink only.

label_verbatim: For General Partner(s)*** which are Entities — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of the entity-GP when the signer is an entity rather than a natural person. Same key family as LLP_MLLP-17, GP_MPA-1, LLP_MLLP-17A.

label_verbatim: By ____ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity-GP.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees.
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
